message:
test(doom/quake): add 47 unit tests for engine constants (bd-2epwo)

Add comprehensive test coverage for doom/constants.rs (23 tests) and
quake/constants.rs (24 tests). Tests validate angle system, fixed-point
math, player constants, BSP format, physics, renderer params, colors,
fog distances, and lightmap limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
